# Sapience HCM

> Modern Human Capital Management platform for hiring, payroll, performance, and engagement — built for the GCC and Levant.

Sapience HCM is comprehensive HR software covering core HR, payroll (WPS-compliant, multi-currency), performance, hiring & onboarding, engagement, biometric and ERP integrations, and a mobile app.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Product overview and highlights
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans (Cloud, Customer Cloud, On Premise) and feature comparison
- [Customers](/customers): Customer stories and testimonials
- [Request a Demo](/request-demo): Book a product demo
- [Request a Quote](/request-quote): Get pricing for your team
- [ROI Calculator](/roi-calculator): Estimate savings vs. current HR ops
- [Getting Started](/getting-started): Onboarding guide
- [Training Program](/training-program): Customer training
- [Webinars](/webinars): Live and recorded sessions
- [Legislations](/legislations): Regulatory frameworks Sapience HCM complies with across GCC, Levant and Asia
- [Partner with Us](/partner-with-us): Channel, Referral and Implementation Partner programs
- [Find a Partner](/partner-with-us/find-a-partner): Directory of Sapience HCM partners
- [Become a Partner](/partner-with-us/become-a-partner): Apply to join the partner program

## Features
- [Core HR](/features/core-hr): Employee records, leave, attendance, shifts
- [Payroll](/features/payroll): GCC payroll, WPS, GL integration, multi-currency
- [Hiring & Onboarding](/features/hiring-onboarding): Recruitment to day-one
- [Performance](/features/performance): Goals, reviews, 360 feedback
- [Engagement](/features/engagement): Surveys, recognition, pulse
- [Organization Management](/features/organization-management): Org chart, hierarchy
- [HR Automation](/features/hr-automation): Workflow automation
- [HR Chatbot](/features/hr-chatbot): Self-service AI assistant
- [Travel & Expense](/features/travel-expense): Travel, claims, approvals
- [Retirement & Separation](/features/retirement-separation): EOSB, exit
- [Mobile App](/features/mobile-app): iOS and Android employee app
- [Biometric Integrations](/features/biometric-integrations): Devices and access
- [ERP Integrations](/features/erp-integrations): SAP, Oracle, Dynamics
- [Custom Services](/features/custom-services): Tailored implementations
- [Integrations](/features/integrations): Connectors and APIs
